LocStr.Desc: Find the hidden treasure in the ancient ruins
Defend the village from the monster invasion
Explore the temple and uncover its secrets
Defeat the dragon and claim the reward
Clear the corruption spreading through the forest
Prepare the kingdom's defenses for the coming battle
Find the hidden path beneath the castle
Stop the dark ritual before the Demon King returns
Escort the legendary hero back to the capital
Face the ultimate enemy in the last confrontation
Complete three challenges to become Guild Master
Navigate the desert to find the hidden oasis
Board the ghost ship and recover the treasure map
Lift the curse from the ice-bound kingdom
Investigate the meteor crash site and its effects
